# The SaaS Partnership
## Fractional Marketing Consultancy for SaaS Companies

> The SaaS Partnership is a UK-based fractional marketing consultancy specialising in growth-stage SaaS companies, PE and VC-backed portfolio businesses, and companies navigating post-acquisition marketing integration. We provide senior specialist expertise — paid media, SEO, demand generation, and fractional CMO leadership — without the overhead of a traditional agency or full-time hire.

---

## About

The SaaS Partnership was founded to solve a specific problem: SaaS companies at critical growth stages need senior marketing expertise, but full-time C-suite hires are expensive, slow to recruit, and often unavailable. Traditional agencies use junior teams and charge high retainers for low accountability. We sit between those two options — senior specialists embedded into your business on a flexible, fractional basis.

We work with:
- Growth-stage SaaS companies (Series A, B and C)
- PE and VC funds with SaaS-heavy portfolios
- Companies navigating post-acquisition marketing integration
- Founders and CEOs who need senior marketing leadership without the full-time cost

---

## Services

### Fractional CMO for SaaS
Senior marketing leadership and strategic oversight for SaaS companies that need CMO-level expertise without a full-time salary commitment. We own marketing strategy, manage execution, and sit in leadership team meetings — acting as a genuine business partner.

### SaaS Paid Media
Paid media management for B2B SaaS — Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and Meta campaigns built around pipeline quality, not vanity metrics. We build full-funnel demand generation programmes with clear attribution to MQLs and pipeline.

### SaaS SEO
Organic growth for B2B SaaS through technical SEO, high-intent content strategy, and authoritative link building. Our approach compounds over time, reducing CAC and increasing the proportion of inbound pipeline from organic search.

### Growth-Stage SaaS Marketing
Specialist fractional marketing for SaaS companies at Series A, B and C. We help businesses accelerate ARR growth, sharpen category positioning, and build scalable marketing infrastructure before committing to full-time senior hires.

### Private Equity Portfolio Marketing
We partner with PE and VC funds to embed senior marketing expertise across portfolio companies. Whether a portfolio company is underperforming, preparing for exit, or needs marketing leadership post-investment, we provide the expertise without permanent headcount cost.

### Post-Acquisition Marketing Integration
Marketing integration and consolidation for SaaS companies navigating M&A. We manage the critical first 100 days — brand alignment, tech stack rationalisation, team structure, and customer communication — to protect revenue and accelerate combined growth.

---

## Engagement Models

**Fractional Embed** — A senior specialist works inside your business part-time, attending team meetings and acting as part of your leadership structure. Typically 2–3 days per week.

**Sprint Projects** — Fixed-scope, fixed-time engagements for specific growth challenges: GTM strategy, channel audits, paid media rebuild, SEO overhaul.

**Advisory** — Strategic guidance and accountability for in-house marketing teams. Typically 1 day per month with access between sessions.

---

## Commercial Approach

We operate on monthly retainers with rolling 30-day notice periods — no long-term agency lock-in. Pricing is transparent and based on the scope of engagement. We do not charge a percentage of ad spend.
